notes:
v2.5.6 Update
⭐ Hideable favorite star: System adapters can now hide the favorite star on custom action-menu rows that are not real items, such as ability checks, saving throws, or rest actions.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.5.6
announcement.content:
v2.5.6 lets system adapters hide the favorite star on non-item action rows.

  • Optional favorite star: Action menu submenu items can set favoritable: false to drop the star and its toggle, while items without the flag keep it.
  • Cleaner custom menus: Adapters that list rules-based actions such as ability checks, saving throws, or rest actions no longer show a star that cannot become a working quick slot.
